headline: AI radar update
insight: Recent AI, agent and developer-tooling signals collected from official and high-signal feeds.
portfolioAngle: Use these signals to decide whether new AI/agent capabilities deserve a future portfolio card.

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.

items.title: Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026
items.summary: Introducing a $100 AI Ultra plan — plus, new features and benefits for Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

items.title: Demis Hassabis said this might be the ‘foothills of the singularity.’ What?
items.summary: Welcome to a "profound moment for humanity," according to Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis, who closed out Google I/O's keynote presentation on Tuesday, saying: Google's cutting-edge research and products will help unl...

items.title: Google’s AI future demands trust — and your personal data
items.summary: Google has big promises for its AI-powered future - and a lot of it depends on your trust. At I/O 2026, Google described a bunch of new tools that it claims will make your life easier. Gemini Spark, Google's always-on AI...
